hero.subtitle: We build SaaS applications and custom software for Arab businesses — with modern tech and professional design.

about.title: We Build Software That Solves Real Problems
about.body: N.N — a developer specialised in building SaaS products from scratch. We work with small and medium businesses across the Arab world to turn their ideas into scalable digital products.
about.val1_desc: Clean code, high performance, exceptional UX
about.val2_desc: From idea to product in the shortest time possible
about.val3_desc: We understand your goals and build what actually serves your business
about.name: N.N

projects.title: What We've Built
projects.subtitle: Every project solved a real problem for a real business
projects.p1_desc: A full SaaS platform for salon management — bookings, customers, staff, courses, and automated WhatsApp notifications.
projects.p2_desc: We're working on a new platform that will transform how another industry operates in the region. Stay tuned.
projects.p3_desc: Have an idea for a project? We'd love to hear it. Get in touch and let's build something great together.

services.title: What We Offer
services.subtitle: From idea to product — we guide you every step of the way
services.s1_desc: Full SaaS platforms with user systems, subscriptions, dashboards, and APIs.
services.s2_desc: Professional, fast, and responsive websites built with the latest technologies.
services.s3_desc: Scalable database design with strict security policies (RLS).
services.s4_desc: Help choosing the right technology and building a clear roadmap for your project.
services.s5_desc: Connect your platform to external services — WhatsApp, Stripe, Supabase, and more.
services.s6_desc: Ongoing monitoring after launch to ensure your product keeps running smoothly.

contact.title: Got a Project Idea?
contact.subtitle: We're here to listen. Tell us about your idea and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
